scope: Pakistan Economic Survey commentary extraction from converted Markdown
source_truth_note: Original PDFs remain source truth. Converted Markdown is a working text layer and table/chart/numeric values require separate QA.
revision_note: Revised after limited stress test on Public_Debt.md, Population.md, and Supplement_2020_21.md.

field_guidance.sector: Chapter, sector, or supplement section inferred from file/chapter heading.
field_guidance.subsection: Nearest heading when available; empty if unclear.
field_guidance.source_page: Markdown page marker number corresponding to the source PDF page.
field_guidance.source_table_or_figure: Table, figure, box, or chart identifier when the evidence comes from a non-prose object.
field_guidance.evidence_type: Whether evidence is prose, table note, table/indicator material, figure text, preface/publication note, table of contents, or mixed.
field_guidance.source_quote: Short quote sufficient to ground the claim. Do not use long passages.
field_guidance.claim: Concise paraphrase of the source-grounded commentary claim.
field_guidance.indicator_or_subject: Main indicator, subject, risk indicator, demographic group, or table topic when applicable.
field_guidance.topic_tags: Multiple topical labels; use for cross-cutting themes rather than creating many fields.
field_guidance.sentiment_signal: Tone in the source wording, not the model's opinion.
field_guidance.time_orientation: Whether the claim is retrospective, current, mixed past/current, future-looking, ongoing, multi-period, general, or unclear.
field_guidance.actors: Optional list of all explicit actors.
field_guidance.policy_or_programme: Primary named policy, package, programme, project, operation, framework, or scheme when explicit.
field_guidance.policy_or_programmes: Optional list of all explicit policies or programmes.
field_guidance.constraint_or_risk: Bottleneck, shock, risk, shortage, vulnerability, or implementation constraint when explicit.
field_guidance.cause: Explicit cause only; leave empty if the model is inferring.
field_guidance.effect: Explicit effect/outcome only; leave empty if the model is inferring.
field_guidance.comparison: Use for comparisons across time, geography, gender, age group, sector, or baseline/comparator categories.
field_guidance.geography: Province, region, urban/rural area, district, country, or comparison geography when substantive.
field_guidance.data_status_flags: Markers such as provisional, revised, final, not available, estimated, base year, rounding, source, projection, or survey-method caveats.
field_guidance.numeric_or_table_sensitive: True when the claim depends on exact numbers, tables, charts, rankings, or definitions requiring separate PDF QA.
field_guidance.requires_pdf_numeric_qa: Default true when numeric_or_table_sensitive is true; may also be true for table-heavy Markdown even without extracted values.
field_guidance.markdown_quality_flags: Known Markdown conversion issues affecting this record.
field_guidance.confidence: Confidence in extraction/classification, not truth of the underlying government claim.
field_guidance.needs_human_review: Default true for this RA workflow.
